metadata.author: Samuel
metadata.subject: A Complete Type of the Gentiles being Redeemed by Christ and United with Him to become His Counterpart.

1: And in the days when the judges ruled, there was a famine in the land. And a certain man from Bethlehem in Judah went to sojourn in the country of Moab, he and his wife and his two sons.
And the name of the man was Elimelech, and the name of his wife was Naomi...
And Elimelech, Naomi's husband, died; and she was left, she and her two sons.
2: And Naomi had a relative of her husband's, a man of great wealth, of the family of Elimelech; and his name was Boaz.
And Ruth the Moabitess said to Naomi, Let me go now to the field and glean among the ears of grain after him in whose sight I find favor. And she said to her, Go, my daughter.

1.text: Boaz is a type of Christ as our Kinsman-Redeemer, the One who possesses the right to redeem us and the wealth to pay our debt.
